basics.name: Bernat Jiménez Esteve
basics.label: Postdoctoral Researcher in Atmospheric Dynamics
basics.summary: Atmospheric scientist specializing in climate variability, heatwaves, teleconnections, and sub-seasonal-to-seasonal predictability. Currently a "César Nombela" Postdoctoral Fellow at IGEO (CSIC-UCM), Madrid.

work.name: Instituto de Geociencias (IGEO, CSIC-UCM)
work.summary: Research on atmospheric dynamics, heatwaves, climate extremes, and sub-seasonal-to-seasonal predictability.
